reviews.comment:
Llegue de madrugada y tenían combustible después de andar varios kilómetros para conseguir combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I arrived early in the morning and they had fuel after walking several kilometers to get fuel.

reviews.comment:
11 de septiembre de 2023 14:30 ..
Compre cosas para seguir el viaje.
Las empleadas un desastre,entras saludas y ni reponden el trato en la compra deja mucho que desear.
Eran 3 empleadas al retirarme tampoco saludaron..No pueden ser así con los viajeros de paso,dejan una mala impresión..una sonrisa o un poquito simpatía no estaría mal.

(Translated by Google)
September 11, 2023, 2:30 PM... I bought things for my trip.
The employees were a disaster. You go in, say hello, and they don't even respond. The service during the purchase leaves much to be desired.
There were three employees, and when I left, they didn't say hello either. They can't treat travelers like that; it leaves a bad impression. A smile or a little friendliness wouldn't hurt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNac2NuQmh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en playa, correcta. Mala atención en el full, productos de dudosa fecha de elaboración, baños sucios. Si se puede solo para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
The service on the beach was adequate. The service at the full-service station was poor; products had questionable expiration dates, and the restrooms were dirty. If possible, only go there to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNadnRfVV9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tenian combustible (infinia nafta). Sanitarios muy sucios. Verguenza ajena al ver que un contingente de Brasileños no podia hacer uso de los baños de tan sucios que estaban.

(Translated by Google)
They had no fuel (infinitely). The restrooms were very dirty. It was embarrassing to see that a contingent of Brazilians couldn't use the restrooms because they were so dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwNXB5YTR3RRAB
